registeredTextMeaning: Known registry lane/source label only; not source-verified and not trusted by this registry.
notes: Phase 2 adds ingestion of existing governed collation/status records.
Registered source IDs do not imply source collation, trust, release readiness, resolver behavior changes, or public-rendering clearance.
Exact-source-collated classifications are inherited only from existing governed result records; this pipeline branch does not perform new live collation.
Do not add Protestant/non-Protestant terminology here; use neutral or tradition-specific source labels.
